name: Chocolate Bundles
recipeIngredient: 1 Sheet Pepperidge Farm Frozen Puff Pastry
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the puff pastry for 30 minutes.
2. Preheat the oven to 425°F.
3. On a lightly floured surface, roll out the puff pastry until it is a 12-inch square.
4. Cut the rolled pastry into 4-6 inch squares.
5. In the center of each square, place 1/4 cup chocolate chips and 1 tablespoon chopped walnuts.
6. Bring the corners of the pastry together just above the chocolate, twisting them to seal.
7. Turn the bundles onto an ungreased baking sheet.
8. Bake for 10-15 minutes, or until golden brown. Let stand at least 10 minutes before serving.
9. Sprinkle with confectioners sugar and serve.
